_comment: This is an example for a FragilityModel object. The reference field links to a Reference (by reference_id) and combines with model_id to form the unique fragility_model_id (e.g., 'TIA-2012-EXP|fra1001'). Component relationships are managed through component_fragility_model_bridge.json. For non-legacy models (those with a reference), edp_metric and edp_unit are required.
